story.text:
# ✨ Commit Language
**💎(commit) → 📖(language) → 🤖(model) → 🔗(enforcement)**
*adamantia · etherchanting · V51*

Commit a programmable contract in language form. Adamantia's enforcement is etherchanted: the language IS the model IS the enforcement.

> Commitment, language, and model are not three artifacts. They are three faces of one blade. Adamantia carries it.

*Keywords:* commit · language · model · etherchant · v51
